name: Intercambiando
description: A language exchange platform connecting learners of Spanish and German. Facilitates real communication between native speakers who want to practice each other's language — built with a focus on community and simplicity.

name: Casa Lucero
description: Website for Casa Lucero, a retreat and accommodation space. Features information pages, an image gallery, and contact management — designed to reflect a warm and welcoming atmosphere.

name: System Change
description: A platform dedicated to systemic change and sustainability. Connects activists, shares resources, and drives meaningful societal transformation through collaborative tools and editorial content.
